background.experience: contamination boundaries, tool accountability, independent verification, and shift turnover
background.attention_bias: residual state between jobs and operator handoff
background.counter_bias: rejects cleanup claims without physical reset

readers.thesis: A CI worker becomes trustworthy when one job consumes one disposable environment and no prior job state survives turnover.
observations: The architecture repeatedly separates project authority from replaceable execution machinery.
uncertainties: No physical worker destruction drill ran.

background.experience: sandbox escape analysis, egress control, image provenance, and evidence retention
background.attention_bias: privilege paths, host sockets, mutable images, and covert persistence
background.counter_bias: rejects containerization as isolation when host authority remains mounted

readers.thesis: Worker sovereignty combines digest-pinned execution, denied host authority, default-deny egress, external logs, and rebuildable disposable roots.
observations: A persistent self-hosted runner remains a reusable attack surface even when the repository is private.
uncertainties: Kernel escape resistance and live JIT registration remain untested.

agreements: One job consumes one disposable worker.
The worker receives no privileged mode, host socket, host home, or reusable credentials.
Runner logs leave the worker before destruction.
disagreements: Reader A prioritizes turnover evidence; Reader B prioritizes escape and supply-chain paths.
omissions_detected: No live JIT registration, egress-proxy enforcement, or destruction receipt ran.
revisions_after_discussion: Bind image digest, job identity, and destruction receipt into release provenance.

notes_added: Self-hosted CI becomes project-owned only after each job receives a disposable, digest-pinned, least-authority environment.
Container isolation remains false sovereignty when the worker mounts host control sockets, credentials, or unrestricted network paths.
notes_challenged: Owning the runner machine alone establishes CI sovereignty.

privacy.review: Synthetic policy, capability metrics, source coverage, and architectural abstractions only.
